auditBiggest: Missed call recovery and appointment reminders — both gaps confirmed
subject: Your Museum Dental audit — here's what I found
body:
Hi Mary,

Based on what you shared, here's what I'm seeing at Museum Dental:

Missed calls: Voicemail only, no callback system

Appointment reminders: No automated reminders

Patient reactivation: Nothing in place

The biggest opportunity I see: Missed call recovery and appointment reminders — both gaps confirmed

I can set all of this up for Museum Dental — done for you, no monthly fees, takes about 5 days.

Want me to walk you through exactly what that looks like?

Mohamed
ClinicFlow Automation
